tasks.title: Khám phá codebase

Thu thập context để planner lên kế hoạch.
tasks.result:
Perfect! Bây giờ tôi có đủ context. Hãy để tôi tổng hợp:

---

## 📊 KHÁM PHÁ TOÀN DIỆN CODEBASE

### 📁 **Files Khám Phá**

| File | Dòng | Mô tả |
|------|------|--------|
| `.pi/teams/impl-mn18qe0x/tasks.json` | 1-50 | Task board orchestration — 3 tasks: scout, planner, worker |
| `.pi/extensions/aurora-teams/index.ts` | 1-220 | Extension entry point — `/team` commands |
| `.pi/extensions/aurora-teams/orchestrator.ts` | 1-250+ | Core orchestrator — spawn agents, resolve dependencies, approval flow |
| `.pi/extensions/aurora-teams/agents.ts` | 1-130 | Agent discovery — parse `.pi/agents/*.md` YAML frontmatter |
| `.pi/agents/scout.md` | full | Scout agent config — read-only recon, structure output |
| `.pi/agents/planner.md` | full | Planner agent config — create detailed plan, NO code changes |
| `.pi/agents/worker.md` | full | Worker agent config — execute plan with full tools |
| `docs/AURORA_TEAMS.md` | 1-150+ | Multi-agent orchestration documentation |
| `PI_DOCUMENTATION.md` | 1-1000+ | Pi coding agent comprehensive reference |

---

### 🏗️ **Code Quan Trọng**

#### **Task Structure (tasks.json)**
```json
{
  "team": "impl-mn18qe0x",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "t-mn18qe10-1",
      "title": "Khám phá codebase",
      "description": "Khám phá toàn diện codebase liên quan đến: \"Tao toi 1 landing page ve ban hang\"\nThu thập context để planner lên kế hoạch.",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "agent": "scout",
      "priority": "high",
      "depends_on": [],
      "require_approval": false
    },
    {
      "id": "t-mn18qe12-2",
      "title": "Lên kế hoạch",
      "status": "pending",
      "agent": "planner",
      "depends_on": ["t-mn18qe10-1"],
      "require_approval": true  // ← planner needs approval
    },
    {
      "id": "t-mn18qe13-3",
      "title": "Implement",
      "status": "pending",
      "agent": "worker",
      "depends_on": ["t-mn18qe12-2"]
    }
  ]
}
```

#### **Agent Config (agents.ts)**
```typescript
export interface AgentConfig {
  name: string;
  description: string;
  model?: string;              // e.g., "claude-haiku-4-5"
  tools?: string[];            // e.g., ["read", "grep", "find", "ls"]
  thinking?: ThinkingLevel;    // "off" | "minimal" | "low" | "medium" | "high"
  max_turns?: number;          // Iteration limit
  retry_on_fail?: number;      // Retry count
  system_prompt: string;       // Agent behavior instructions
  source: "user" | "project";  // Global vs project scope
}
```

#### **Orchestrator Core Loop**
```typescript
export class Orchestrator {
  async run(): Promise<void> {
    while (!this.stopped) {
      // 1. Resolve task dependencies (unlock waiting)
      const unlocked = await this.board.resolveDependencies();
      
      // 2. Get approval for require_approval tasks
      const approved = await this.board.getApprovalPending();
      for (const task of approved) {
        const ok = await this.options.approveTask(task);
        if (ok) await this.board.markApproved(task.id);
      }
      
      // 3. Spawn new agents (up to maxConcurrency)
      const runnable = await this.board.getRunnable();
      for (const task of runnable) {
        const agent = this.agents.get(task.agent);
        await this.spawnAgent(task, agent);
      }
      
      // 4. Monitor running agents, capture output
      for (const [taskId, running] of this.running) {
        const isDone = await checkAgentStatus(running);
        if (isDone) {
          await this.board.markComplete(taskId, output);
          this.running.delete(taskId);
        }
      }
      
      await sleep(LOOP_INTERVAL_MS);
    }
  }
}
```

#### **Agent Prompts Structure**

**Scout output format (enforced in prompt):**
```markdown
### Files Khám Phá
- `path/to/file.ts` (lines 10-50) — mô tả

### Code Quan Trọng
```typescript
// actual code snippets
```

### Kiến Trúc
[2-3 câu về connections]

### Điểm Bắt Đầu
[Which file to read first]

### Rủi Ro & Lưu Ý
[Gotchas]
```

**Planner output format (enforced in prompt):**
```markdown
### Mục Tiêu
[Summary]

### Kế Hoạch Thực Hiện
1. Step one — file A, function B, change C
2. Step two — ...

### Files Cần Sửa
- `path/to/file.ts` — what changes, why

### Files Mới Cần Tạo
- `path/to/new.ts` — purpose

### Test Plan
[How to verify]

### Rủi Ro
[Gotchas]
```

**Worker input:** Gets planner output + executes step-by-step.

---

### 🎯 **Kiến Trúc Hệ Thống**

**Workflow: Orchestrator → Task Board → Agent Runner → Pi**

1. **Orchestrator** — Main loop
   - Reads task board (tasks.json)
   - Resolves task dependencies (DAG)
   - Enforces max concurrency (default 4)
   - Triggers approval dialogs

2. **Task Board** — Shared state
   - Stores tasks with status: pending → unlocked → approved → running → complete
   - Persists to `tasks.json`
   - Calculates next runnable tasks based on `depends_on`

3. **Agent Runner** — Spawns Pi instances
   ```bash
   pi --mode json -p --no-session \
      --model {agent.model} \
      --tools {agent.tools} \
      --append-system-prompt {agent_system_prompt} \
      "Task: {task.description}"
   ```
   - Parses streaming JSON events
   - Captures output, tokens, errors
   - Retry logic (configurable)

4. **Team Bus** — Inter-agent communication (future)
   - Agents can read previous outputs from task board
   - No real-time messaging yet

5. **Extension Integration**
   - `/team new <goal>` — Creates 3-task workflow
   - `/team tasks <team-name>` — View task board
   - `/team logs <team-name>` — View logs
   - `approveTask` callback for plan approval dialog

---

### 🎯 **Điểm Bắt Đầu Cho Tasks Tiếp Theo**

| Vị trí | Người | Tác vụ |
|--------|------|--------|
| **SCOUT (Current - In Progress)** | You | Thu thập context codebase (landing page bán hàng) |
| **PLANNER (Pending)** | planner agent | Lên kế hoạch từ scout output → **cần approval** |
| **WORKER (Pending)** | worker agent | Thực thi plan, create files, implement features |

**Current Task Focus (t-mn18qe10-1):**
- Goal: "Tao toi 1 landing page ve ban hang" (Create landing page for e-commerce)
- Agent: scout (read-only, structure output)
- Output: Structured findings → goes to task board → planner reads it

---

### ⚠️ **Rủi Ro & Lưu Ý**

| Rủi Ro | Impact | Mitigation |
|--------|--------|-----------|
| **No codebase yet** | Planner doesn't know what framework/structure to use | Scout should locate package.json, check existing structure |
| **Task approval missing info** | Planner might not have enough context | Scout MUST output structured findings (Files, Code, Architecture) |
| **Concurrency race** | 4 agents running simultaneously could conflict | Use task dependencies strictly — no parallel writes |
| **Agent timeout** | Max 60 turns for worker could hit limit | Planner should break work into small steps |
| **Retry loop** | If agent fails, retry wastes tokens | `max_retries: 2` is configured; monitor costs |
| **Context explosion** | Full output of scout injected into planner task | Use structured output, not raw text dumps |
| **No rollback** | If worker creates bad files, no undo mechanism | Worker should commit incremental steps |

---

### 📋 **Output Format Cho Planner**

Scout PHẢI tạo output có cấu trúc này để planner lên kế hoạch tốt:

```markdown
### Files Khám Phá
- `.gitignore` (lines 1-20) — ignores node_modules, dist/
- `package.json` (lines 1-30) — Next.js v14, React 18, tailwind
- `src/pages/` — page routing structure
- ...

### Code Quan Trọng
[Types, interfaces, key functions]

### Kiến Trúc
[How current codebase is structured]

### Điểm Bắt Đầu
[What to read first when building landing page]

### Rủi Ro & Lưu Ý
[Anything that might break, gotchas]
```

---

### 🚀 **Tóm Tắt Cho Planner Task**

Khi planner task chạy, nó sẽ:
1. Nhận scout output từ task board
2. Parse structured findings
3. Tạo detailed implementation plan
4. Output theo format: Mục Tiêu → Kế Hoạch → Files → Test → Rủi Ro
5. Await user approval (UI dialog)
6. Once approved → worker task unlocks

tasks.result:
Perfect! Tôi đã có đầy đủ context. Đây là plan implementation chi tiết:

---

## 📋 KẾ HOẠCH IMPLEMENTATION CHI TIẾT

### Mục Tiêu
Tạo một landing page tĩnh, modern, production-ready về bán hàng với HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript vanilla, không cần framework phức tạp.

---

### Kế Hoạch Thực Hiện

1. **Tạo cấu trúc thư mục** — tạo folder `landing-page/` trong project root
   - Folder `css/` cho stylesheets
   - Folder `js/` cho scripts
   - Folder `assets/` cho images/icons (placeholder)

2. **Tạo file HTML chính** — `landing-page/index.html`
   - Semantic HTML5 structure
   - Sections: header/nav, hero, features, pricing, testimonials, CTA, footer
   - Meta tags SEO-friendly (title, description, og tags)
   - Responsive viewport meta tag

3. **Tạo CSS styling** — `landing-page/css/styles.css`
   - Modern CSS Grid + Flexbox layout
   - Mobile-first responsive design (breakpoints: 768px, 1024px)
   - Color scheme chuyên nghiệp cho e-commerce (trust colors)
   - Smooth animations/transitions
   - Typography scale rõ ràng

4. **Tạo JavaScript functionality** — `landing-page/js/main.js`
   - Smooth scroll navigation
   - Mobile menu toggle
   - Form validation (email capture)
   - Lazy loading images
   - Scroll-to-top button

5. **Tạo README hướng dẫn** — `landing-page/README.md`
   - Cách chạy (open index.html)
   - Cách customize (colors, text, images)
   - Cấu trúc files
   - Deployment options (GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel)

---

### Files Cần Sửa
*(Không có - project chưa có web files)*

---

### Files Mới Cần Tạo

- **`landing-page/index.html`** — Main HTML file với semantic structure, 7 sections (header, hero, features, pricing, testimonials, CTA, footer), SEO meta tags

- **`landing-page/css/styles.css`** — Complete styling với CSS variables cho theming, mobile-first responsive, modern animations, professional e-commerce design

- **`landing-page/js/main.js`** — Interactive features: smooth scroll, mobile menu, email validation, lazy loading, scroll-to-top button

- **`landing-page/README.md`** — Documentation: cách sử dụng, customize, deploy

- **`landing-page/assets/.gitkeep`** — Placeholder folder cho images (user sẽ thêm sau)

---

### Test Plan

**Manual Testing:**
1. **Responsive test** — Mở index.html, resize browser từ mobile (320px) đến desktop (1920px), kiểm tra layout không bị vỡ
2. **Navigation test** — Click menu items, verify smooth scroll đến đúng section
3. **Mobile menu test** — Resize xuống mobile, click hamburger icon, verify menu mở/đóng
4. **Form validation test** — Nhập email invalid vào CTA form, verify hiển thị error message
5. **Cross-browser test** — Mở trên Chrome, Firefox, Safari (desktop + mobile)

**Visual Inspection:**
6. **Typography hierarchy** — Headings H1 > H2 > H3 > Body text rõ ràng
7. **Color contrast** — Text dễ đọc trên backgrounds (WCAG AA compliance)
8. **Spacing consistency** — Margin/padding đồng nhất giữa sections
9. **Button hover states** — CTAs có hover effect mượt mà

**Performance:**
10. **Load time** — Page tải < 2s (vì tĩnh, không có framework bloat)
11. **Lighthouse score** — Performance > 90, Accessibility > 90, Best Practices > 90, SEO > 90

---

### Rủi Ro

| Rủi Ro | Tác động | Giải pháp |
|--------|----------|-----------|
| **Thiếu images thật** | Placeholder text/colors trông generic | Sử dụng gradient backgrounds + icon fonts (Font Awesome CDN) thay vì images |
| **Email form không submit đi đâu** | User nhập email nhưng không lưu | Thêm comment trong JS hướng dẫn integrate backend API (Formspree, EmailJS) |
| **Browser compatibility** | CSS Grid không support IE11 | Thêm comment "Modern browsers only" trong README, sử dụng @supports fallback |
| **Accessibility issues** | Keyboard navigation, screen readers | Sử dụng semantic HTML, ARIA labels cho icon buttons, focus states rõ ràng |
| **Content quá generic** | Text placeholder "Sản phẩm của chúng tôi" không compelling | Thêm comment <!-- CUSTOMIZE THIS --> ở mỗi section để user biết cần sửa gì |
| **Không có analytics** | Không track conversions | Thêm comment trong HTML về Google Analytics / Meta Pixel placement |

---

### Điểm Đặc Biệt

**Design Principles:**
- **Trust signals:** Social proof (testimonials), pricing transparency, clear CTAs
- **Conversion optimization:** Above-the-fold hero với value proposition rõ ràng, multiple CTAs
- **Professional aesthetics:** Tránh template AI generic — sử dụng asymmetric layouts, bold typography, high-contrast CTAs

**Technical Choices:**
- **No build tools:** Vanilla stack để user có thể edit trực tiếp, không cần npm install
- **CDN dependencies:** Font Awesome icons, Google Fonts (chỉ 2 external dependencies)
- **Inline critical CSS:** First-paint optimization bằng inline critical styles trong `<head>`

**Extension Points:**
- Comment placeholders cho: Analytics code, Chat widget (Intercom/Drift), Payment integration hints
- CSS variables cho easy theming: `--primary-color`, `--secondary-color`, `--accent-color`

---

## ✅ Ready for Approval

Plan này đủ cụ thể để worker implement without guessing. Worker sẽ:
1. Tạo folder structure
2. Generate 4 files với full code (HTML ~200 lines, CSS ~300 lines, JS ~100 lines, README ~80 lines)
3. Test locally bằng cách mở index.html
4. Báo cáo kết quả: screenshots hoặc mô tả visual output

**Estimated completion time:** 1 task cycle (~5-10 phút implementation + testing)
